description: Style NoteA hard-wearing pair of sandals from lee cooper, with an arsenal of new design updates. Style this with a tonal monochrome tee and a fitted pair of shorts.Product DetailsGreen and grey sandals with velcro straps across the forefoot and midfoot and around the backfoot (has mesh inlays)Tough, grooved footbedTPU outsole with multidirectional lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
